response.justification: Mohammed is a strong candidate due to his extensive, long-term experience in the geospatial domain, including founding his own open-source Geo-Data platform. His work on low-latency, high-throughput systems with DLang demonstrates the right engineering mindset for building data pipelines. While his professional C++ experience is not recent, his deep expertise in a similar systems language and clear passion for the domain make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing to assess his ability and willingness to work with modern C++.
strengths: Deep, demonstrated experience in the geospatial domain, including founding a GIS platform.
Proven experience building low-latency, high-performance distributed systems.
Strong initiative and passion shown through numerous open-source projects in a systems language (DLang).
concerns: Lacks recent, professional experience with C++ or Rust, the primary required languages.
Past C++ experience is limited (7 months) and dated (nearly a decade ago).
Geospatial experience is in GIS and data collection, not specifically routing tile generation.
